use_cases: Visualizing daily activity or contribution patterns over a month
Tracking habit completion or streaks with color-coded intensity
Displaying productivity metrics or code commit history
Showing user engagement patterns for analytics dashboards
Representing fitness goals or sleep data over time
ai_summary: A monthly heatmap calendar component that displays color-coded activity data across days of a month, typically used for visualizing contributions, habits, or engagement metrics. Often styled with gradient intensities to represent data magnitude, with hover interactions revealing detailed information for each day.
